title: Who Might Host the Morning Radio Show?
summary: Scott Mills was the host of a popular morning radio show on BBC Radio 2, but he had to leave his job. Now, the radio station needs to find a new person to host the show. Two main people are being talked about as possible new hosts. Vernon Kay is a favorite because he already hosts another big show on Radio 2 with many listeners. Sara Cox is another choice because she has experience hosting morning shows before and works on Radio 2 too. The station has to think carefully because changing hosts can affect other shows. This is a big decision for the radio station to make.

people who tune in to hear the radio show

What is the breakfast show on Radio 2?
Who are the two main people talked about as possible new hosts?

background_read: BBC Radio 2 is a popular radio station in the UK that plays music and has talk shows. The breakfast show is one of its most important programs because many people listen to it in the morning. Hosts like Scott Mills, Vernon Kay, and Sara Cox are well-known presenters who entertain listeners with music and conversations. When a host leaves, the station has to find someone new to keep the show running smoothly.
Article_Structure: WHO: Scott Mills, Vernon Kay, Sara Cox, and BBC Radio 2 executives
WHAT: Finding a new host for the breakfast show after Scott Mills left
WHERE: BBC Radio 2 in the UK
WHY: Because Scott Mills had to leave his job, and the station needs a new host to continue the popular morning show

perspectives.description: They need to choose a new host carefully to keep listeners happy and manage other shows.
